---
title: "shrec"
---

**Shared recurrence** — companion code to Gilpin,
*Recurrences Reveal Shared Causal Drivers of Complex Time Series*,
Phys. Rev. X **15**, 011005 (2025).

The SHREC algorithm reconstructs an unobserved driver $z(t)$ from $N$
measured response time series $x_k(t)$. The canonical pipeline lives at
[`shrec.RecurrenceManifold`](quickstart.qmd) (continuous driver) and
`shrec.RecurrenceClustering` (discrete driver).

## Install

```bash
uv add shrec                # core
uv add 'shrec[viz]'         # + matplotlib/seaborn for the quickstart
```

## Where to go next

- [Quickstart](quickstart.qmd) — recover a hidden driver from chaotic
  logistic responses in ~30 lines.

## Citation

```bibtex
@article{gilpin2025shrec,
  title   = {Recurrences Reveal Shared Causal Drivers of Complex Time Series},
  author  = {Gilpin, William},
  journal = {Physical Review X},
  volume  = {15},
  pages   = {011005},
  year    = {2025},
}
```
